signals.headline: Drift Protocol Hack Confirmed: $280M Loss on Solana DeFi Platform April 1 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Drift Protocol Hack Confirmed: $280M Loss on Solana DeFi Platform April 1 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana-based Drift Protocol suffered a $280M hack on April 1 via social engineering of its multisig, affecting user deposits but sparing insurance funds; team paused functions and engaged law enforcement.[6] This marks one of the largest crypto hacks, potentially impacting Solana sentiment amid on

signals.headline: What happens next:**
signals.raw:
What happens next:**
U.S. and Iranian delegations were invited to Islamabad on April 10, 2026, for further negotiations toward a conclusive settlement of all disputes.[1] The ceasefire came shortly before President Trump's deadline and followed an Iranian rejection of a ceasefire proposal on April 6, making this reversal significant.[4]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?
Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A

signals.headline: Market impact:**
signals.raw:
Market impact:**
The ceasefire announcement temporarily calmed financial markets and lowered oil prices after six weeks of conflict in the region.[2]

The substantive negotiations remain unclear, as Iran's earlier proposal reportedly included release of frozen assets and U.S. military withdrawal—terms difficult to reconcile with stated U.S. objectives.[1]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?

signals.headline: February Core PPI Jumps to 3
signals.raw:
February Core PPI Jumps to 3.9%, Fuels Speculation on Kevin Warsh Fed Rate Hike | YES | MED confidence**  
Pre-oil shock U.S. producer price data released Wednesday showed annual core inflation at 3.9%, implying 3-month annualized core PCE at 4.56%—over double the Fed's 2% target—prompting markets to price in potential hikes under incoming Fed chair Kevin Warsh, despite Fed's unchanged 3.50-3.75%

signals.headline: Kevin Warsh Nomination Heightens Fed Policy Uncertainty, Pressuring South Korean Won | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh Nomination Heightens Fed Policy Uncertainty, Pressuring South Korean Won | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh as Fed chair introduces uncertainty over inflation response and rate path, contributing to the won's slip to 1,457/USD amid trade tensions, as markets anticipate a stronger dollar.[4]
